prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年浙江省综合类最低录取位次分别为约9006名→9047名→8261名→7951名→8584名，整体呈先降后升的波动走势。2023–2024年位次明显前移（8261→7951） ，但2025年回退至8584名，较2024年后移约633名，近两年波动幅度约600–800名。2025年基准位次约8584名；该校在浙江省综合类招生计划2021年85人→2022年9 5人→2023年104人→2024年101人→2025年97人，呈先扩后缩趋势。2026年计划仅61人，较2025年大幅缩减约37.1%，缩招幅度显著，理论上使竞争有所缓解，位次有前移 倾向。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 哈尔滨工业大学（威海）为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，共享哈工大品牌。软科中国大学排名中哈工大校本部2026年位列第12名（Top20），威 海校区作为哈工大重要组成部分，享有同等声誉与学科资源，对考生有较强吸引力；2026年高考周期内哈工大声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情事件。抖 音学校热度总排名第10（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，反映报考关注度较高。历史投档异常记录中未见哈工大（威海）明显断档信号，报考心理预期稳定；哈 工大（本部）第五轮学科评估中A-及以上学科达17个，包括力学A+、机械工程A+、材料科学与工程A+、环境科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、控制科学与工程A、软件工程A等 。威海校区开设的工科试验班（AI加先进技术领军班、机器人与智能装备拔尖班等）与上述优势学科高度关联，学科实力强劲。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通 信、电气工程等工科专业在2024–2026年专业热度分析中持续处于高热推荐或推荐状态，社会报考热情高。浙江省2026年高考考生总数约40万人，较2025年29.1万人大幅增加约37. 8%，竞争显著加剧，对位次形成后移压力。；哈工大（威 海）位于山东省威海市，对浙江省考生而言属于跨省报考。该校在浙江省招生计划占比较小（2025年97人），属省外优质生源竞争，无本省倾斜效应。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025 年基准位次8584名、2026年招生计划大幅缩减37.1%（推动位次前移）、浙江省考生总数激增37.8%（推动位次后移）以及学校985层次+高热抖音关注度+强势工科学科等正向吸引 力，缩招效应与考生增加效应基本对冲但考生增幅略占上风，加之工科专业持续高热推高竞争热度。预测2026年最低录取位次约6873名，较2025年8584名前移约1711名；位次区间 6373–7373名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（AI加先进技术领军班）：涵盖计算机科学与技术、人工智能、网络空间安全、自动化、通信工程、电子信息工程、集成电路设计与集成系统、光电信息科学与工程、 电气工程及其自动化等专业；对应哈工大计算机科学与技术A、控制科学与工程A、信息与通信工程A-、电子科学与技术A-等优势学科
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（机器人与智能装备拔尖班）：涵盖机器人工程、机械设计制造及其自动化、智能制造工程、材料科学与工程、能源与动力工程等专业；对应哈工大机械工程A+、材料 科学与工程A+、动力工程及工程热物理A-等优势学科
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 2026年招生计划仅设一个专业大类（工科试验班（未来信息）），计划61人，涵盖计算机、人工智能、自动化、通信、电子信息、集成电路、电气等热门方向。建议以该大类整体 作为报考目标，内部专业任选
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年哈工大（威海）在浙江省仅设一个工科试验班（未来信息）大类招生，计划61人，涵盖计算机、人工智能、电子信息等全部热门方向且类内专业任选。位次在预测区间637 3–7373名内可积极报考，位次优于区间下限（<6373名）录取把握较大；位次在区间中段（约6873名附近）属正常竞争区间；位次接近区间上限（7373名附近）可作冲刺。该大类 内部无专业分流风险，报考性价比高。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Zhejiang Province Comprehensive category were approximately 9006 → 9047 → 8261 → 7951 → 8584, showing a fluctuating trend of first decreasing then increasing. Rankings significantly moved forward from 2023 to 2024 (8261 → 7951), but retreated to 8584 in 2025, moving back about 633 places compared to 2024, with a fluctuation range of about 600–800 places in recent two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 8584; the enrollment plan for this university in Zhejiang Province Comprehensive category was 85 in 2021 → 95 in 2022 → 104 in 2023 → 101 in 2024 → 97 in 2025, showing a trend of first expansion then contraction. The 2026 plan is only 61, a significant reduction of about 37.1% compared to 2025, which theoretically eases competition and tends to move rankings forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Harbin Institute of Technology (Weihai) is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, sharing the HIT brand. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, HIT main campus ranked 12th (Top 20) in 2026. As an important part of HIT, the Weihai campus enjoys equal reputation and disciplinary resources, strongly attracting candidates. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, HIT's reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion incidents. Douyin school popularity total ranking is 10th (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms, reflecting high application attention. No obvious gap signal in historical admission anomalies for HIT (Weihai), indicating stable application expectations. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, HIT (main campus) has 17 disciplines rated A- or above, including Mechanics A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Control Science and Engineering A, Software Engineering A, etc. The engineering experimental classes offered at Weihai campus (such as AI Plus Advanced Technology Leading Class, Robot and Intelligent Equipment Top Class) are highly related to these advantageous disciplines, with strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering have been consistently in high heat recommendation or recommended status in the 2024–2026 major popularity analysis, with high social application enthusiasm. The total number of college entrance examination candidates in Zhejiang Province in 2026 is about 400,000, a significant increase of about 37.8% compared to 291,000 in 2025, intensifying competition and putting pressure on rankings to move back. HIT (Weihai) is located in Weihai City, Shandong Province, which is a cross-province application for Zhejiang candidates. The enrollment plan for this university in Zhejiang Province is relatively small (97 in 2025), belonging to competition for high-quality students from other provinces, with no local preference effect.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 8584, the significant reduction of 37.1% in the 2026 enrollment plan (pushing rankings forward), the sharp increase of 37.8% in the number of Zhejiang candidates (pushing rankings backward), and the positive attraction of the university's 985 level, high Douyin attention, and strong engineering disciplines, the contraction effect and candidate increase effect roughly offset each other, but the candidate increase slightly dominates. Additionally, the sustained high heat of engineering majors increases competition. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 6873, moving forward about 1711 places compared to 8584 in 2025; the ranking range is 6373–7373.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (AI Plus Advanced Technology Leading Class): Covers majors such as Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Cyberspace Security, Automation, Communication Engineering, Electronic Information Engineering, Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Electrical Engineering and Automation, etc.; corresponds to HIT's advantageous disciplines including Computer Science and Technology A, Control Science and Engineering A, Information and Communication Engineering A-, Electronic Science and Technology A-, etc.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Robot and Intelligent Equipment Top Class): Covers majors such as Robotics Engineering, Mechanical Design and Manufacturing and Automation, Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Energy and Power Engineering, etc.; corresponds to HIT's advantageous disciplines including Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics A-, etc.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- The 2026 enrollment plan only includes one major category (Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information)), with a plan of 61 students, covering popular directions such as Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Automation, Communication, Electronic Information, Integrated Circuits, Electrical Engineering, etc. It is recommended to target this category as a whole, with free choice of internal majors.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, HIT (Weihai) only offers one Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information) category in Zhejiang Province, with a plan of 61 students, covering all popular directions such as Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Electronic Information, etc., with free choice of majors within the category. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 6373–7373 can actively apply; those with rankings better than the lower limit (<6373) have a high chance of admission; those with rankings around the middle of the range (about 6873) are in the normal competition zone; those with rankings near the upper limit (around 7373) can consider it as a reach. This category has no risk of major differentiation, offering high value for application.
